Off Calendar Mar-09-2020 Continued To May-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emily Wirowek for Julia Hathaway, Administrator, via Court Call.

Ms. Wirowek stated that Dana's mother is going to file for a social security number instead of the ICIN route and that she doubts she will have a social security number by June as she is in the Philippines. The Court noted that counsel should have filed something in writing with this information. Ms. Wirowek stated that the funds are still in the probate account and only administrator, Julia Hathaway, who lives in Oakland, has access to it, that all other receipts have been filed on Feb. 14th, that Maria and Aaron were born in the United States then moved to the Philippines with their parents and had SSNs, that Dana has a different mother and Jacklyn has a different mother. The Court inquired about the logistics of Dana's mother getting to the consulate. Mr. Wirowek responded that they are quite poor, that the mother is scrounging money from family to get to the consulate, that the Coronavirus quarantine might affect her neighborhood, that she would need to borrow money and a car for the 4-5 hours drive, and that the mother does not want to take Dana out of school and wants to wait until June to get the SSN. The Court inquired why she can't proceed with an ICIN then get a SSN later. Ms. Wirowek stated that the ICIN was supposed to take 4-6 weeks for Jacklyn but it ended up taking almost a year, that there is no certainty if SSN would be the same, and the IRS agent said it would hold up ICIN if she files for SSN in the middle. The Court noted that it is anxious that the funds are sitting in a public account and somebody needs to take responsibility to counsel Dana's mother. Ms. Wirowek stated that there is a language barrier, that there was an attorney assisting with the guardianship but he is not longer representing her because she cannot afford to pay him. The Court noted that it will not continue this for one year, that it will continue it for two months, and it wants a written status on deposit of funds.

The status hearing for proof of deposit of the share for Dana into a blocked account, etc. is continued to May 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To Aug-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emily Wirowek for Julia Hathaway via Court Call

The Court inquired as to the filing of an amended accounting. Ms. Wirowek stated that they discovered errors on the Inventory and Appraisal, they are working on an amended inventory which will go out to the Probate Referee next week, and can then file an amended accounting. The Court also inquired about Probate Guardianships for the minor children. Ms. Wirowek stated that 1 mother has been appointed in the Philippines, and the other 2 mothers in the Philippines are working with attorneys to set up guardianships. The Court noted that the blocked accounts should be set up California for our Court to supervise the withdrawals. Ms. Wirowek stated that is not what the mothers want, will do what is appropriate, hopes to file an amended inventory and appraisal by mid June, and requested a 3 month continuance. The First and Final Account of Administrator, etc. is continued to August 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
